data.title: California Water Service Group named one of "America's Greenest Companies" by Newsweek, only two water utilities honored.
data.description: California Water Service Group has been recognized as one of the top two water utilities in the United States and named among America's Greenest Companies by Newsweek. The company's commitment to environmental sustainability and green initiatives has set them apart, earning them this prestigious accolade. This recognition highlights their efforts to promote eco-friendly practices while providing essential services to customers.

data.title: Phillips Edison & Company (Nasdaq: PECO) will host a virtual Business Update on December 17, 2025, at 12:00 p.m. Eastern Time.
data.description: Phillips Edison & Company, Inc. (Nasdaq: PECO), a leading owner and operator of grocery-anchored neighborhood shopping centers, is set to conduct a virtual Business Update on December 17, 2025, at 12:00 p.m. EST. This event, exclusively available via webcast, comes in light of PECO's position as one of the nation's largest in its industry. Stay tuned for insights into their operations and outlook.

data.title: LaFayette Acquisition Corp priced $100M IPO of 10M units at $10 each, trading on Nasdaq under "LAFAU" starting Oct 24, 2025.
data.description: In Paris, France, on October 23, 2025, LaFayette Acquisition Corp revealed the pricing of its initial public offering of 10,000,000 units at a $10.00 per unit. These units are projected to start trading on October 24, 2025, on the Global Market tier of the Nasdaq Stock Market LLC under the symbol “LAFAU.”

data.title: Deckers Outdoor Corp. (NYSE: DECK) beats Q2 estimates with earnings of $1.82 per share (16% above estimates) and revenue of $1.43 billion (above $1.41 billion estimate). HOKA brand net sales increase by 11.1% to $634.1 million.
data.description: Deckers Outdoor Corp. (NYSE: DECK) recently released its second-quarter earnings report, revealing some significant figures. The company reported quarterly earnings of $1.82 per share, surpassing the Street estimate of $1.57 by an impressive 16%. Their quarterly revenue reached $1.43 billion, beating the analyst estimate of $1.41 billion. The HOKA brand saw a notable increase in net sales, rising by 11.1% to $634.1 million from $570.9 million. For more details on this report and other related news, you can find the full story on Benzinga.com. Keep an eye on DECK stock for real-time price movements.

data.title: Richmond American Homes opens new community in Las Vegas - Seasons at Vandalia offers beautiful paired homes.
data.description: The Grand Opening of Seasons at Vandalia in Las Vegas on Oct. 23, 2025, unveiled stunning paired homes complete with designer details by Richmond American Homes of Nevada, Inc, a subsidiary of Sekisui House U.S., Inc. The event showcased a collection of beautiful homes, highlighting exquisite craftsmanship and luxurious finishes. This development offers a range of housing options, with a starting price of approximately $300,000. The opening event attracted a significant number of interested buyers, with over 500 attendees exploring the model homes and experiencing the unique features of each residence. Seasons at Vandalia presents a prime opportunity for those seeking upscale living in a desirable Las Vegas location.

data.title: Newmont Q3 earnings beat expectations: Revenue $5.52B, EPS $1.71, gold production down 4%, avg gold price $3,539 per ounce.
data.description: Newmont Corp (NYSE: NEM) released its third-quarter financial results after markets closed on Thursday. The gold miner reported Q3 revenue of $5.52 billion, surpassing analyst projections of $5.18 billion. Adjusted earnings for the quarter were $1.71 per share, higher than the expected $1.42 per share. Gold production dropped by 4% YoY to around 1.42 million ounces due to decreased gold grades and planned shutdowns. The average realized gold price was $3,539 per ounce. Newmont reported generating $2.6 billion in the quarter. NEM stock is trending. For more details, visit Benzinga.com.

data.title: Dorchester Minerals, L.P. announces $0.689883 per common unit distribution for Q3 2025, payable on Nov 13, 2025.
data.description: Dallas-based Dorchester Minerals, L.P. disclosed its financial update for the third quarter of 2025. The company, trading under NASDAQ as DMLP, declared a cash distribution of $0.689883 per common unit, reflecting the activities during the quarter that concluded on September 30, 2025. This distribution is scheduled to be paid out on November 13, 2025, to common unitholders recorded as of November 3, 2025.

data.title: Ford Motor Co. (NYSE: F) Q3 earnings beat estimates: 45 cents/share (est. 36 cents) on $47.18B revenue (est. $43.07B).
data.description: Ford Motor Co. (NYSE: F) disclosed its Q3 earnings post Thursday's market close. The report unveiled earnings of 45 cents/share, surpassing the estimated 36 cents. Revenue for the quarter stood at $47.18 billion, beating the projected $43.07 billion and marking a rise from the $43.06 billion in the corresponding period last year. For more detailed insights on Ford's business segment highlights and stock movement, refer to the full article.

data.title: M-tron Industries, Inc. reveals warrant trigger achieved; warrants now exercisable for shares. #MPTI #NYSE #stocks
data.description: In Orlando, Florida, on October 23, 2025, M-tron Industries, Inc. (NYSE American: MPTI) made an announcement regarding warrants for purchasing shares of the Company's common stock. These warrants were initially granted on April 25, 2025. The common stock has a par value of $0.01 per share. This news signifies a positive development for M-tron Industries, Inc.

data.title: Louisville Family Dental offering brain stimulation for mental health, launching on Oct. 30. Groundbreaking technology without medication. (characters: 126)
data.description: A launch party is scheduled for Oct. 30 in LOUISVILLE, Neb., to introduce a revolutionary treatment option for anxiety, depression, and cognitive enhancement. This event coincides with Mental Health Screening Month and aims to showcase a new technology that offers non-medication solutions. The technology is targeted at individuals looking to address mental health issues, with a focus on reducing anxiety and treating depression. The party will provide insights into this innovative approach, welcoming attendees interested in exploring alternatives to traditional medication. This initiative aligns with the observance of Mental Health Screening Month and emphasizes the importance of accessible and diverse treatment options.

data.title: CyberCube estimates $38M to $581M insurance losses for AWS outage, "Amazonk", with low to mid-single digit loss ratio impact.
data.description: In San Francisco, CyberCube, a top cyber risk analytics provider, has unveiled a preliminary loss projection for the recent Amazon Web Services (AWS) outage. Dubbed as "Amazonk" by CyberCube, the estimated losses fall between $38 million to $581 million. This event is anticipated to result in a marginal to moderate impact on cyber insurers, with a projected loss ratio impact in the low- to mid-single digits. CyberCube believes the incident poses only a moderate risk for the insurance sector, indicating potential for limited overall impact.

data.title: BioRender partners with Anthropic to integrate scientific illustrations into Claude for Life Sciences, addressing AI-accelerated research challenges.
data.description: A strategic partnership has been confirmed between BioRender, a prominent AI-driven platform for scientific communication, and Anthropic. This collaboration will incorporate BioRender's vast collection of scientifically precise icons and templates into Claude for Life Sciences. This integration aims to tackle a significant obstacle faced in AI-driven research, where the acceleration of artificial intelligence condenses decades of biological advancements into a much shorter timeframe. By directly addressing the growing need for improved human comprehension and communication in this field, this partnership seeks to enhance the efficiency of scientific research.

data.title: Money market fund assets reach $7.40 trillion, up $30.37 billion, with government funds increasing by $24.86 billion.
data.description: According to a report released today by the Investment Company Institute, total assets in money market funds rose by $30.37 billion to reach $7.40 trillion for the week ending on October 22, 2025. Government funds within taxable money market funds saw a notable increase of $24.86 billion during this period.

data.title: Sabio plans to offer up to $4 million through a LIFE offering, not for distribution in the United States.
data.description: This information should not be shared with wire services in the United States or distributed within the country.

data.title: Intel's Q3 earnings beat expectations with revenue of $13.65B (est. $13.14B) and EPS of 23 cents (est. 1 cent); stock surges.
data.description: Intel Corp released their third-quarter financial results after the bell on Thursday. The company reported total revenue of $13.65 billion, surpassing analyst predictions of $13.14 billion. Intel also reported adjusted earnings of 23 cents per share, exceeding estimates of one cent per share. This marks a 3% increase in total revenue compared to the previous year. The Client Computing Group generated $8.5 billion in revenue during the quarter. INTC stock is exhibiting notable strength following the earnings report. For further details, refer to the full story on Benzinga.com.

data.title: NAV CANADA posted strong financial results for 2025, investing in air navigation system. Key investments include iTEC SkyNex and a Digital Aerodrome Air Traffic Services facility in Kingston.
data.description: NAV CANADA announced its financial results for the year ending August 31, 2025. The company showcased strong financial performance despite the challenging aviation environment by prioritizing safety and investing in the future of Canada's air navigation system. Investments in staffing and training led to a decrease in service delivery risks and progress in long-term transformation plans. Notable achievements include the upcoming implementation of iTEC SkyNex, a pioneering technology in Canadian air traffic management, and the commencement of construction on the country's inaugural Digital Aerodrome Air Traffic Services facility in Kingston. The full report can be found on Benzinga.com.

data.title: Changpeng Zhao, founder of Binance Exchange, pardoned by Trump despite money-laundering violations aiding criminals. Zhao is richest in crypto.
data.description: The wealthiest individual in the cryptocurrency industry, Changpeng Zhao, acknowledged committing money-laundering offenses that facilitated the transfer of funds for terrorists and other criminals through Binance.

data.title: Patti Engineering is now a Premier Ignition Integrator, the highest level in the program, showing excellence in Ignition projects.
data.description: Patti Engineering has been acknowledged as a Premier Ignition Integrator, the top certification level in the Inductive Automation Integrator Program. This status is obtained through a track record of showcasing proficiency in the platform and completing top-notch Ignition-based projects.

data.title: Zions Bancorporation CFO to present at BancAnalysts Association of Boston Conference on November 6 at 3:05 pm ET.
data.description: A financial officer from Zions Bancorporation (NASDAQ: ZION) will be speaking at the BancAnalysts Association of Boston Conference on November 6th at 3:05 pm ET. The event will take place at the Langham Hotel in Boston. The presentation will be broadcasted live via webcast.
